title: odontarrhena crenulata
intro: Odontarrhena crenulata, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading plant with tiny leaves and purple flowers. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which help to combat infections and promote healing. The health benefits of Odontarrhena crenulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Odontarrhena crenulata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin.
